keys.noBackup: Hapana kiyibheki yakavharidzwa iripo yeakaunti iyi

keySetup.title: Gadzirisa makiyi emudziyo wako
keySetup.description: Mudziyo uyu hauna kiyiyako yakavanzika parizvino. Tumira kiyibheki yakachengetedzwa nepassword, kana kugadzira kiyipairi itsva (uchakwanisa kuverenga mameseji matsva kubva zvino).
keySetup.imported: Kiyi yakavanzika yakaiswa mumudziyo uyu. Unogona kuverenga mameseji ekare zvino.
keySetup.enterPassword: Pinda password yeakaunti yako kuti tigone kuchengetedza makiyi ako zvakachengeteka.

auth.headline: Kutumira mameseji kwakachengeteka kune chero munhu, chero kupi
auth.description: Kuvharidzira kubva kumagumo kusvika kumagumo, kuturikira mumitauro inodarika 100, mameseji anonyangarika, uye kufona kweizwi/vhidhiyo.

feature.encryption: Kuvharidzira kubva kumagumo kusvika kumagumo nekukurumidza
feature.translation: Kuturikira kwemameseji kwakanaka uye kwakavakwa mukati
feature.privacy: Kutanga nekuvharidzira. Ruzivo rwako, kutonga kwako.
feature.translate: Kuturikira kwemameseji kwakanaka uye kwakavakwa mukati

hero.line1: Kutumira mameseji kwakachengeteka kune chero munhu, chero kupi — ne
hero.sub: Wana nhamba yefoni yakachengeteka yemahara kuti ufonere uye utumire mameseji pasi rose pamusoro peWi-Fi kana data. Enjaya kuvharidzira kubva kumagumo kusvika kumagumo, mameseji anonyangarika, uye kufona kweHD kweizwi/vhidhiyo — nezviridzwa zvakavakwa mukati zvinokubatsira kuti urambe wakabatana nemiganhu.
hero.freeNote: Kufona uye kutumira mameseji kwebasic ndekwemahara. AI yakakwirira uye zvinhu zvakakwirira zvinoda kusimudzira.

feat.encryption: Kuvharidzira kubva kumagumo kusvika kumagumo, nguva dzose
feat.privacy: Kutanga nekuvharidzira. Ruzivo rwako, kutonga kwako.

auth.desktopTip: Uri padhesiki? Vhura nefonhi yako kuti utore app.
auth.scanHelper: Uri padhesiki? Vhura nefonhi yako kuti utore app.
auth.subhead: Kutumira mameseji kwakavanzika, kwakavharidzwa, uye kwakaturikirwa — nekukurumidza.
auth.tip: Zano: Shandisa akaunti imwe chete pawebhu uye nharembozha. Mameseji ako anoramba akabatana.
auth.scanHint: Vhura kuti udhodhe app kana kuvhura mubhurawuza rako.

registration.passwordDescription: Minimum mabhii 6. Shandisa password yakasimba, yakasiyana.
registration.smsConsent: Nekugadzira akaunti, unobvumirana kugamuchira SMS yeziviso dzine chekuita neChiitiko chako cheChatforia (semameseji kubva kune vamwe vashandisi). Mitengo yemessage & data inogona kushanda. Unogona kudzima chero nguva muSettings.

auth.addRecipient: Wedzera munhu anogamuchira pamusoro kuti utange…
auth.oneRecipient: Ndapota pinda munhu mumwe chete parizvino.
auth.enterValidRecipient: Pinda zita rekontakti rakachengetwa kana nhamba yefoni.
auth.sendFailed: Kutumira kwakakona. Tarisa console kuti uwane ruzivo.

chat.selectPrompt: Sarudza text kana chat room kuti utange kutaura
chat.unlockToView: Vhura kiyi yako kuti uone message iyi

messageInput.freeLimit: Muganhu wepurani yemahara: auto-delete kusvika zuva rimwe. Yakamisikidzwa ku1d.
messageInput.premiumLimit: Max auto-delete yePremium ndi30 mazuva. Yakamisikidzwa ku30d.
messageInput.nothingToSend: Nyora message kana kubatanidza faira kuti utumire.
messageInput.caption: Caption (zvisina basa)

errors.attachmentTooLarge: Chakabatanidzwa chakakura zvakanyanya. Edza faira diki.
errors.rateLimit: Uri kutumira mameseji nekukurumidza. Ndapota dzikamisa.
errors.validation: Chikanganiso chekusimbisa. Ndapota tarisa message yako uye edza zvakare.
errors.failedToSend: Yatadza kutumira. Unogona kuedza zvakare bhabhu yakakona.

contactList.notJoined: Kontakti iyo haina kujoinha Chatforia parizvino.
contactList.couldNotStart: Yatadza kutanga chat. Ndapota edza zvakare.
contactList.startFailed: Yatadza kutanga chat. Ndapota edza zvakare.
contactList.deleteFailed: Yatadza kubvisa kontakti. Ndapota edza zvakare.
contactList.updateAliasFailed: Yatadza kuvandudza alias. Ndapota edza zvakare.
contactList.loadFailed: Yatadza kutakura makontakti. Ndapota edza zvakare.
contactList.callStarted: Kufona nhamba iyi kuburikidza nenhamba yako yeChatforia…
contactList.callFailed: Yatadza kutanga kufona. Ndapota edza zvakare.

startChatModal.title: Tanga hurukuro
startChatModal.searchPlaceholder: Tsvaga zita, zita remushandisi, kana nhamba yefoni
startChatModal.noRecentInteractions: Hapana kubata kwakaitwa nguva pfupi yapfuura parizvino.

addContactModal.title: Wedzera kontakti
addContactModal.enterPhoneOrUsername: Pinda nhamba yefoni kana zita remushandisi.

profile.title: Profile yeMushandisi
profile.showOriginalAndTranslation: Ratidza mameseji ekutanga pamwe chete nekuturikira
profile.noPrivateKey: Hapana kiyi yakavanzika pamudziyo uyu yekutuma.
profile.setBackupPassword: Seta password kuti uvharidze kiyibheki yako:
profile.importFailed: Yatadza kutumira kiyi (password isina kufanira kana faira rakakanganiswa).
profile.keysRotated: Kiyipairi itsva yakagadzirwa uye kiyipabhuriki yakadhodhwa.
profile.keyDisclaimer: Kiyi yako yakavanzika haiende kunze kwemudziyo uyu. Tumira kopi yakachengetedzwa nepassword kuti uidzorerazve pane mumwe mudziyo.
profile.themeFreeNotice: Uri paFree—shandisa Sun/Moon sarudzo dziri pasi. Simudza kuti uvhure mamwe ma themes.
profile.backupDesc: Chengetedza kiyi yako yekuvharidzira kuti udzorerazve mameseji ako pane mumwe mudziyo zvakachengeteka.
profile.freePlanCopy: Uri papurani yemahara. Simudza kuti uvhure zvinhu zvakawanda sekuchengetedza, nhamba dzimwe, uye sarudzo dzakakwirira dzekuvanzika.
profile.portalOpenFailed: Yatadza kuvhura portal yebilling. Ndapota edza zvakare.
profile.followHint: Nyaya dzavo dzichawonekwa mufidhi yako yeFollowing kana vakatumira nevateveri (kana Ruzhinji).
profile.sectionCrashedBody: Chimwe chinhu chakaipa chakaitika muchikamu ichi.
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Tumira mafoni uye mameseji anouya kune foni yako yakasimbiswa kana email. Mafoni/text anobuda anogona kuratidza nhamba yako yeChatforia.
profile.errSmsDest: Sarudza kanenge kamwe kune (foni kana email).
profile.errQuietHours: Maawa akanyarara anofanira kuva pakati pe0 ne23.
profile.ageBandHint: Tinongochengeta chikamu chemakore (kwete zuva chairo rekuzvarwa). Izvi zvinoshandiswa kuchengeta pairings dzeRandom Chat dzakakodzera.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Shandisa matching yakavakirwa pamakore muRandom Chat
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Kana yakavhurwa, tinoedza kukubatanidza nevanhu vari muzvikamu zvemakore zvakafanira.
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Vechidiki vanogara vachibatanidzwa chete nevamwe vechidiki. Vakuru havagone kubatanidzwa nevana vechidiki.
profile.teenMatchingNote: Nekuchengetedza, maakaunti ari muzvikamu 13–17 anogona kungobatanidzwa chete nemamwe maakaunti 13–17 muRandom Chat.
profile.foriaRememberDesc: Kana iyi yakavhurwa, Foria anogona kushandisa hurukuro dzako dzekare dzeRandom Chat (chete newe) kuchengeta hurukuro ichienderera. Unogona kuidzima chero nguva.
profile.voicemailAutoDeletePlaceholder: Siya isina chinhu kuti igare nokusingaperi
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Inoshandiswa kana greeting yako yeaudio isipo.
profile.voicemailNote: Maivoicemails kubva kunhamba dzako dzeChatforia anochengetwa muInbox yako yeVoicemail. Unogona kubatsira transcription uye kutumira mupurani dzinotsigirwa.
profile.portHint: Unoda kuchengeta nhamba yako yazvino? Unogona kuipota muChatforia Wireless.

esim.title: Chatforia eSIM
esim.desc: Tora data yenharembozha yeChatforia kana uri kure neWi-Fi.

wireless.title: Chatforia Wireless
wireless.description: Tonga purani yako yenharembozha yeChatforia, nhamba, forwarding, uye kupota nhamba.

options.heading: Sarudza kuti unoda kushandisa Chatforia sei
options.subheading: Unogona kuwana nhamba itsva yeChatforia, kana kuunza nhamba yako yazvino kubva kune mumwe mutakuri.
options.portNumber: Pota nhamba yako yazvino muChatforia Wireless

port.heading: Pota nhamba yako yazvino
port.subheading: Fambisa nhamba yako yazvino yefoni kubva kumutakuri wako wezviro wemuChatforia. Ita kuti ruzivo rwunoenderana neakaunti yako yemutakuri chaizvo kuti udzivise kunonoka.

status.heading: Status yekupota
status.subheading: Tarisa status yezvikumbiro zvako zvekupota nhamba.

wireless.exhausted: Data yako yapera. Tenga pack itsva kuti urambe uchishandisa data yenharembozha.

error.invite: Yatadza kugadzira kukoka. Ita kuti uri muridzi wemhuri uye edza zvakare.
error.checkout: Yatadza kutanga checkout yepurani yeFamily. Ndapota edza zvakare.

billing.freePlanCopy: Uri papurani yemahara. Simudza kuti uvhure zvinhu zvakawanda.
billing.cancelNowHelp: Unogona kutonga kana kanzura subscription yako muportal yebilling, kana kanzura nekukurumidza pasi.
billing.cancelNowConfirm: Une chokwadi kuti unoda kanzura purani yako nekukurumidza? Izvi hazvigone kudzoserwa.
billing.cancelNowError: Yatadza kanzura purani yako parizvino. Ndapota edza zvakare kana shandisa Manage billing.

none.title: Hapana mhuri yakagadzirwa parizvino
none.body: Kuti ugadzire Chatforia Family uye data pool yakagoverwa, tanga purani yeFamily.

data.heading: Data pool yakagoverwa
data.caption: Nhengo dzese dzinogovera pool iyi. Tichakuyambira paunenge uchivedza muganhu wako.

invite.title: Koka nhengo itsva
invite.body: Tumira email kana link kukoka munhu kuti apinde mudata pool yakagoverwa yemhuri yako.
invite.expiryHint: Link iyi inopera mushure memazuva mashoma. Unogona kugadzira itsva nguva dzose.

join.title: Joinha mhuri
join.body: Wakakokwa kuti ujoinhe Chatforia Family uye ugoverane data pool yavo.
join.success: Wakajoinha mhuri iyi. Zvino unogoverana data pool yavo.
join.error: Yatadza kuwedzera iwe kumhuri iyi. Kukoka kunogona kunge kusina kufanira kana kwapera.

premium.heading: Enda Premium
premium.description: Vhura zvinhu zvine simba & bvisa ads.

upgrade.title: Simudza
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Tanga nepurani yedu yemahara ine ads. Enda pasina ads nePlus, kana kuvhura zvinhu zvine simba zvizere nePremium.
upgrade.subtitle: Sarudza purani yeapp, wedzera data packs kune iwe, kana kugoverana data nemhuri yako — zvese kubva panzvimbo imwe.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Tanga nepurani yedu yemahara ine ads. Enda pasina ads nePlus, kana kuvhura zvinhu zvine simba zvizere nePremium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Wedzera data ye eSIM yepasi rose kuti Chatforia irambe ichishanda kunyange kana uri kure neWi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Gadzira data pool yakagoverwa yemhuri yako uye tonga kushandiswa kwevose kubva panzvimbo imwe.
upgrade.benefitsLine: Vhura zvinhu zvine simba & bvisa ads.

free.title: Mahara
free.desc: Tanga kutumira mameseji nemahara. Yakanakira kana uri kungoyedza Chatforia.

features.chat: Chat chaiyo-yechokwadi 1:1 uye boka, pamwe nemafoni eizwi uye vhidhiyo
features.media: Govera mifananidzo, mameseji eizwi, uye mavhidhiyo mapfupi
features.ai: AI-yakavakirwa mapinduro akachenjera uye kuturikira kwechokwadi (kushandiswa kwakanaka)
features.disappearing: Mameseji anonyangarika uye kutonga kwekuvanzika kwebasic

plus.title: Plus
plus.desc: Zvinhu zvese zvakakosha, pasina ads. Yakanakira kutumira mameseji uye kufona zuva nezuva.

features.forwarding: Tumira mafoni uye mameseji kune nhamba yako chaiyo yefoni
features.support: Rubatsiro rwokukurumidza kana chimwe chinhu chakaipa

premiumMonthly.title: Premium (Mwedzi Mumwe)
premiumMonthly.desc: Chiitiko chizere cheChatforia: zviridzwa zveAI, kugadzirisa, uye rubatsiro rwokutanga.

features.themes: Vhura ma themes ese e premium mavara uye kugadzirisa app
features.ai: Zviridzwa zveAI zvakangopihwa Premium zvekunyora zvakare, mapinduro akachenjera, uye summaries
features.support: Rubatsiro rwokutanga paunenge uchida rubatsiro rwakanyanya

premiumAnnual.title: Premium (Gore)
premiumAnnual.desc: Chengeta zvakawanda kana uchibhadharwa gore rimwe — kusanganisira ma themes e extra mavara, zviridzwa zveAI, uye rubatsiro rwokutanga.

features.allPremium: Zvinhu zvese muPremium Mwedzi Mumwe — kusanganisira ma themes e extra mavara
features.save25: Chengeta zvingaita 30% kana uchibhadhara mwedzi mumwe
features.bestFor: Yakanakira vashandisi vane simba, vashandi vepasi rose, uye vafambi vakanyanya

premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Inobhadharwa pamberi. Kanzura chero nguva. Hapana mari dzakavanzika.

marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Zvinhu zvizere, maringi tones, uye zviridzwa zveAI zvine simba.
marketing.premiumAnnualDesc: Chengeta zvakawanda kana uchibhadharwa gore rimwe.
marketing.annualDisclaimer: Inobhadharwa pamberi. Kanzura chero nguva. Hapana mari dzakavanzika.

mobile.title: Chatforia Nharembozha (eSIM data packs)
mobile.subtitle: Wedzera data yepasi rose kuti Chatforia irambe ichishanda kunyange pasina Wi-Fi. Mitengo inogadziriswa otomatiki zvichienderana nenyika yako uye mari.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Sarudza data pack yepasi rose kamwe chete kuti Chatforia irambe ichishanda paunenge uchifamba kana kure neWi-Fi.
mobile.note: Hatitengesi data packs pasi pe3 GB.

features.throttle: Kumhanya kunogona kudzika mushure mekushandiswa kwakanyanya

disclaimer.devices: eSIM data packs inoda mudziyo unotsigira eSIM uye wakavhurika. Kuwanikwa kunoenderana nemhando yefoni, mutakuri, uye nyika. Kuvharika uye kumhanya kunosiyana nenzvimbo.

small.title: Starter pack
small.desc: Inosanganisira 3 GB yedata inokurumidza — yakanakira kutumira mameseji kwepfupi uye mafoni apo neapo.
small.bestFor: Nzendo dhipfupi, kutumira mameseji kwepfupi, uye mafoni apo neapo

medium.title: Traveler pack
medium.desc: Inosanganisira 5 GB yedata inokurumidza yenzendo, kufamba, uye mafoni eVoIP anogara aripo.
medium.bestFor: Nzendo dzevhiki, mafoni eVoIP anogara aripo, uye mepu

large.title: Power pack
large.desc: Inosanganisira 10 GB yedata inokurumidza yekutaura kwakanyanya, mafoni, uye vhidhiyo panetiweki yeChatforia.
large.bestFor: Kutaura kwakanyanya, mafoni, vhidhiyo, uye kushandisa hotspot
large.aria: Tenga Power user eSIM data pack

compare.title: Enzanisa eSIM data packs
compare.disclaimer: Kushandiswa chaiko kwe data kunoenderana nekuti unoshandisa Chatforia sei (izwi, vhidhiyo, media, uye mamwe maapp pafoni yako).

family.title: Chatforia Mhuri (data yakagoverwa)
family.subtitle: Goverana data pool imwe chete nemhuri yako. Bhiri rimwe, maakaunti akawanda eChatforia, kuvharika kwepasi rose.

small.title: Family Small
small.desc: Inosanganisira 20 GB yedata inokurumidza yakagoverwa — yakanakira vashandisi 2–3 vepfupi.

medium.title: Family Medium
medium.desc: Inosanganisira 40 GB yedata inokurumidza yakagoverwa — yakanakira nhengo 3–5 dzinoshanda.

large.title: Family Large
large.desc: Inosanganisira 80 GB yedata inokurumidza yakagoverwa — yemhuri dzine simba dzinogara dziri online.

feature.fairUse: Inotevera fair-use policy uye miganhu yenzvimbo

family.disclaimer: Mapack eMhuri anogadzira kana kuwedzera data pool yakagoverwa. Unogona kukoka uye kubvisa nhengo chero nguva.
family.footnote: Mapack eMhuri anogoverana data pool imwe chete kune maakaunti eChatforia akabatana. Kuwanikwa uye miganhu kunoenderana nenyika yako uye mitemo yenzvimbo.

why.title: Nei vanhu vachichinja kuChatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia inokupa nhamba chaiyo yefoni, kuturikira kwakachenjera, uye nzira yakajeka yekuenda pasina ads kana uchinge wagadzirira.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Ads akareruka paFree, kusimudzira kwePlus kwakareruka kana uchinge wagadzirira, uye zviridzwa zvePremium zvisipo muTextNow.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: App yemazuva ano, kugadzirwa kwepasi rose kutanga, uye kuturikira kwakavakwa mukati panzvimbo pekuendesa mafoni ekare.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs maapp ekutumira mameseji
messengers.body: Tumira nhamba chaiyo dzefoni — kwete chete vashandisi vemamwe maapp — neAI uye status yakavakwa mukati. Yakanakira kana uri kuuya kubva kumaapp seTextFree kana TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Kuzenzanisa kunobva paruzivo rwunowanikwa pachena uye kunogona kuchinja nekufamba kwenguva. Mamwe maapp ekutumira mameseji emahara seTextFree kana TextMe anowanzo fanana neTextNow.

free.q: Purani yeMahara iri yemahara chaizvo here?
free.a: Hongu. Purani yeMahara inosanganisira nhamba yeChatforia, kufona, uye kutumira mameseji ine ads. Unogona kugara paFree kwenguva dzose, kana kusimudza kuti ubvise ads uye uvhure zvinhu zvakawanda.

plusPremium.q: Musi mutsauko uripo pakati pePlus nePremium?
plusPremium.a: Plus inobvisa ads uye inowedzera nhoroondo yemameseji yako — yakanakira kushandiswa zuva nezuva. Premium inowedzera kugadzirisa kwakawanda, zviridzwa zveAI zvekunyora zvakare uye mapinduro, uye rubatsiro rwokutanga kuvashandisi vane simba.

esim.a: Chatforia Nharembozha inoshandisa kuvharika kwe eSIM yepasi rose. Kuwanikwa kunoenderana nenyika yako uye mudziyo. Uchaona sarudzo dzinotsigirwa panguva yekuvhurwa mukati meapp.

cancel.q: Ndingakwanisa kanzura kana chinja mapurani chero nguva here?
cancel.a: Hongu. Unogona kutonga kana kanzura subscription yako kubva peji yebilling muapp. Shanduko dzinoita kushanda pakupera kwenguva yako yazvino yekubhadhara.

family.a: Mapack eMhuri anogadzira data pool yakagoverwa kune maakaunti akawanda eChatforia. Munhu mumwe anobhadhara bhiri, uye unogona kukoka kana kubvisa nhengo uye kuseta miganhu pamunhu.

gettingStarted.title: Kutanga
gettingStarted.subtitle: Mutsva kuChatforia? Iyi nzira yekutanga inoratidza zvakakosha kuti ugone kushanda mumaminitsi mashoma.

alert.text: Iyi gwara richakura sezvo tichivhura zvinhu zvitsva. Kana chimwe chinhu chichishaikwa, tiudze kuburikidza ne

section2.title: 2) Tanga kutumira mameseji
section2.item1: Gadzira DM kana Boka uye tumira message yako yekutanga.
section2.item2: Shandisa kuturikira kwechokwadi kuti utaure mumitauro inodarika 100.
section2.item3: Edza mameseji anonyangarika uye zviratidzo zvekuverengwa muProfile → Kuvanzika.

section3.title: 3) Enda mberi
section3.item1: Unogona kusimudza purani yakabhadharwa chero nguva mukati meapp.
section3.item2: Kana uchinge wasaina, unogona kubatanidza mamwe madhizaini uye kuseta kiyibheki dzakavharidzwa kubva kuSettings muapp.

account.q: Ndingagadzira kana kudzorera sei akaunti yangu?
account.a: Dhodha app kana shandisa webhu, baya “Gadzira akaunti”, simbisa email/foni yako. Kuti udzorerazve, shandisa “Wakakangwa password”.

privacy.q: Mameseji anovharidzwa kubva kumagumo kusvika kumagumo here?
privacy.a: Hongu. Mameseji nemafoni anovharidzwa kubva kumagumo kusvika kumagumo nekukurumidza. Iwe nemunhu anogamuchira chete munogona kuverenga.

translate.a: Batsira “Auto-turikira” muSettings → Kutaridzika & Mutauro. Tinoturikira pamudziyo panotsigirwa, kana zvisina kuita kuburikidza nemaAPI akachengeteka ane metadata shoma.

contact.a: Tibate pa support@chatforia.com. Sanganisira screenshots uye vhezheni yeapp yako.

contact.title: Tibatei
contact.errorSend: Yatadza kutumira. Ndapota tumira email ku support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: Iyi Policy yekuvanzika inotsanangura kuti Chatforia (“isu”, “tiri”) inounganidza, inoshandisa, uye inogovera ruzivo sei paunenge uchishandisa maapp edu nemasevhisi. Tinogadzira Chatforia kuti tidzikise data ratinogona kuwana.

infoWeCollect.title: Ruzivo rwatino unganaidza
infoWeCollect.account: Ruzivo rweakaunti (e.g., email/foni) kugadzira uye kuchengetedza akaunti yako.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Zviri mukati zvakavharidzwa (mameseji/mafononi) zvakavharidzwa kubva kumagumo kusvika kumagumo; hatigone kumuverenga.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/kushandiswa sekumap log ekuparara, mhando yemudziyo, kana analytics yakajairika kuti tivandudze kushanda.

sms.title: Nhamba dzefoni dzenharembozha neSMS
sms.body: Kana ukasarudza kupa nhamba yefoni yenharembozha, tinoishandisa kuti tibatsire zvinhu sekusimbisa akaunti, ziviso dzekupinda, uye kutumira mameseji kubva kumushandisi kune mumwe mushandisi kuburikidza neSMS panotsigirwa. Tinogona kutumira mameseji eSMS ane chekuita neakaunti yako uye chiitiko paChatforia. Unogona kudzima kugamuchira mameseji eSMS chero nguva nekupindura nekeyword yekudzima inotsigirwa (se “STOP”) kana kushandura zvaunoda munotifika muapp. Hatitengesi nhamba yako yefoni kana kuishandisa kushambadzira kusingaenderane.
sms.addRecipient: Wedzera munhu anogamuchira pamusoro kuti utange…

howWeUse.title: Tinoshandisa ruzivo sei
howWeUse.provide: Kupa uye kuchengetedza sevhisi (auth, kuzivisa spam/abuse).

sharing.title: Kugovera
sharing.body: Hatitengesi data yemunhu. Tinogona kugovera data shoma nevashandisi (e.g., ziviso dzekupusha, analytics) pasi pemakondirakiti akasimba.

rights.title: Kodzero dzako
rights.body: Zvichienderana nenzvimbo yako (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), unogona kukumbira kuwana, kugadzirisa, kubvisa, kana kudzima kushandiswa kwezvimwe zvinogadziriswa. Bata: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Kuchengetwa kwedata & kuchengetedza
retention.body: Tinongochengeta zvinodiwa kuti tishande sevhisi uye tishandise kuchengetedza kwemazuva ano. Zviri mukati zveE2E hazvigone kudekriptwa nesu.

children.title: Vana
children.body: Chatforia haina kunangwa kuvana vari pasi pegore gumi nematatu (kana sezvinodiwa nemutemo wenzvimbo yako).

changes.title: Shanduko
changes.body: Tichatumira ziviso pano uye tinovandudza zuva re “Yakavandudzwa kupedzisira”.

contact.title: Tibatei
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: Nekushandisa Chatforia unobvumirana nemitemo iyi. Kana usingabvumirani, usashandise sevhisi.

accounts.title: Maakaunti
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Paunopa ruzivo rwakarurama uye uchengete zvitupa zvakachengeteka.

acceptableUse.title: Kushandiswa kunobvumirwa
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Hapana zviri zvisiri pamutemo, zvinotambudza, kana zvinotyora; hapana spam kana abuse yotomatiki.

sms.title: Kutaurirana neSMS
sms.body: Kana ukapa nhamba yefoni yenharembozha, unobvumirana kuti Chatforia inogona kutumira mameseji eSMS ane chekuita neakaunti yako uye kushandiswa kwesevhisi, sekuziviso dzekupinda, ziviso dzekuchengetedza, uye mameseji ane chekuita nehurukuro dzaunotanga kana kupinda. Hatishandisi SMS kushambadzira kana kushambadzira pasina mvumo yako yakajeka. Mitengo yemessage ne data inogona kushanda. Unogona kudzima mameseji eSMS chero nguva nekupindura nekeyword yekudzima inotsigirwa (semuenzaniso, “STOP”) kana kuvandudza zvaunoda munotifika muapp.

yourContent.title: Zviri mukati zvako
yourContent.body: Unoramba kodzero dzezviri mukati zvako. Unotipa kodzero dzinodiwa kuti tishande sevhisi (e.g., kutumira, kuchengeta, kuturikira).

disclaimer.title: Zvisingabvumirwe & mutoro
disclaimer.body: Sevhisi inopihwa “sezvazviri” pasina zvivimbiso. Kusvika pakukwana kwese kunobvumirwa nemutemo, Chatforia haina mutoro wekukuvadza kwakadzikisira kana kwekukuvadza kunotevera.

changes.title: Shanduko
changes.body: Tinogona kuvandudza mitemo iyi; kuramba uchishandisa mushure mesh anduko kunoreva kubvumirana.

contact.title: Tibatei
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Usatengese kana Govera Ruzivo Rwangu Rwemunhu
doNotSell.body: Chatforia haitengesi ruzivo rwemunhu. Vagari veCalifornia vanogona kuramba vachitumira zvikumbiro pasi peCPRA vachishandisa bhatani riri pasi.

cookies.title: Settings dzeCookie
cookies.body: Chatforia inoshandisa macookie mashoma (e.g., session, kuchengetedza). Hatishandisi macookie eads yechitatu. Tonga macookie kuburikidza nemasetting ebhurawuza rako.

phoneNumberManager.noNumberAssigned: Hapana nhamba yakapihwa. Sarudza imwe ne area code kuti utange kutumira mameseji.

startChatModal.title: Tanga chat
startChatModal.nameUsernamePhoneEmail: Nyora zita, zita remushandisi, foni, kana email…
startChatModal.searchByUsernameOrPhone: Tsvaga ne zita remushandisi kana foni
startChatModal.searchPrompt: Nyora zita remushandisi kana foni uye baya Tsvaga.
startChatModal.saveContactsHint: Zvipikiro zvefoni/email zvichawanikwa mushure mekuzvichengeta semakontakti.

sounds.freeNotice: Uri paFree — ma tones e premium anoratidzwa asi akavharwa. Simudza kuti uvhure ese.

aiSettings.title: Settings dzeAI
aiSettings.controlIntro: Tonga kuturikira, mapinduro akachenjera, uye otomatiki mapinduro eForiaBot.
aiSettings.showOriginalAlongside: Ratidza text yekutanga pamwe chete nekuturikira
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Tumira mameseji akapfupi akagamuchirwa (akachengetedzwa) kuAI kuti upe mapinduro anokurumidza.
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: Kana yakavhurwa, mazano anodzorerwa neAI achava nemashoko akatarwa akavharwa

accessibilitySettings.title: Kuwanikwa & Ziviso
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Sarudzo dzekuita Chatforia nyore kushandisa pasina kuvimba neruzha.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Inotanga pane saizi yakajairika. Wedzera kana uchida text yakakura mumasetting ekuwanikwa.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Ziviso zvinoonekwa dzemameseji & mafoni
Ratidza banners uye kuti musoro ubvumire kuti usapotsa chiitiko.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Vibrate pamameseji matsva (kana akatsigirwa)
Konzera vibration yemudziyo neziviso.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Flash skrini pafoni inouya
Kupenya kwakajeka kwenguva pfupi kana foni ichirira.
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: Batanidza transcript kune mameseji eaudio aunogamuchira.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Ratidza banners uye kuti musoro ubvumire kuti usapotsa chiitiko.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Kupenya kwakajeka kwenguva pfupi kana foni ichirira.

privacySection.strictE2EE: Kuvharidzira kwakasimba kubva kumagumo kusvika kumagumo
privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Chengeta chete ciphertext pamusoro. Inodzima AI/Turikira uye previews yekumodereta.

peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: Tsvaga ne alias, zita, zita remushandisi, kana foni
peoplePage.inviteDesc: Goverana link yako yekukoka kuti utange kutaura nekukurumidza.
peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: Rambe wakabatana paunenge uchifamba neChatforia yeiOS neAndroid.
peoplePage.syncTip: Zano: Mameseji ako anoramba akabatana pawebhu uye nharembozha.

randomChat.title: Random Chat
randomChat.description: Sangana nemumwe munhu mutsva nekukurumidza. Tichakubatanidza uye tivhure imba yekutaura yenguva pfupi. Tanga kutaura zvisingazivikanwe. Wedzera Shamwari gare gare kana zvakanaka.
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: Tinongochengeta chikamu chemakore (kwete zuva chairo rekuzvarwa). Izvi zvinoshandiswa kuchengeta pairings dzeRandom Chat dzakakodzera. Kuti ubatanidzwe nevanhu (kwete chete RiaBot), seta chikamu chako chemakore muSettings → Makore & Random Chat.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Seta chikamu chako chemakore muProfile → Makore & Random Chat kuti ubatanidzwe nevanhu.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: Kuti ubatanidzwe nevanhu (kwete chete RiaBot), seta chikamu chako chemakore muSettings → Makore & Random Chat.
randomChat.subtitle: Sangana nemumwe munhu mutsva nekukurumidza, kana sarudza kutaura ne Ria.
randomChat.setAge: Seta chikamu chako chemakore muProfile → Makore & Random Chat kuti ubatanidzwe nevanhu.

ria.intro: Hei ipo 👋 Ndiri Ria. Chii chiri mupfungwa dzako?

greetings.long1: Hei {{name}} 👋 Ndiri pano. Chii chiri mupfungwa dzako?
greetings.long2: Hi {{name}} 😊 Chii chaungade kutaura nezvacho nhasi?
greetings.long3: Hei {{name}}!! Ndiri kuteerera — chii chiri kumusoro?
greetings.long4: Zvinonakidza kukuona, {{name}} 👋 Chii chiri mupfungwa dzako nhasi?
greetings.long5: Hei {{name}} 😊 Unoda kutaura, kubvunza, kana kungotaura chete?
greetings.long6: Hi {{name}}!! Ndine nguva — chii chaungade kutaura nezvacho?
greetings.short1: Hei {{name}}, ndichiri pano. Chii chiri kumusoro?
greetings.short2: Mauya zvakare {{name}} 👋 Chii chimwe chaungade kuwedzera?
greetings.short3: Wadzoka zvakare, {{name}}? 😊 Ndiudze chii chiri mupfungwa dzako.
greetings.short6: Oh hei {{name}}!! Une chimwe chitsva chiri mupfungwa dzako?

login.title: Endera mberi kuChatforia
login.subtitle: Pinda muakaunti yako yeChatforia

forgot.title: Wakakangwa Password
forgot.helper: Pinda email yakashandiswa kugadzira akaunti yako yeChatforia uye tichakutumira link yakachengeteka yekudzorerazve password yako.
forgot.genericError: Yatadza kugadzirisa chikumbiro. Ndapota edza zvakare mumaminitsi.
forgot.sentHelper: Kana akaunti iripo neemail iyo, takatumira link yekudzorerazve password. Inogona kutora maminitsi mashoma kuti isvike. Ita kuti utarise spam kana promotions folder.

login.ssoUnavailable: Single-sign-on haisi kuwanikwa parizvino. Shandisa zita remushandisi & password panzvimbo.

error.invalid: Zita remushandisi kana password isina kufanira
error.unprocessable: Chikumbiro chisina kufanira. Tarisa zita rako remushandisi/email ne password.
error.deviceLimit: Muganhu wemudziyo wasvika papurani yeMahara. Buda pane mumwe mudziyo kana simudza kuPremium kuti ubatanidze mamwe madhizaini.

dialer.title: Mafoni
dialer.subtitle: Keypad & zvakaitika. (Kana usingashandise PSTN, tanga mafoni kubva kumusoro wehurukuro.)

video.title: Vhidhiyo
video.roomsDesc: Vhidhiyo yevanhu vazhinji uchishandisa zita rakagoverwa remba.
video.roomsIntro: Joinha kana gadzira imba yevanhu vazhinji.
video.deeplinkTip: Zano: unogona kuita deep link yakananga ku /video?room=room-name.

direct.title: Vhidhiyo Yakananga
direct.subtitle: Tanga kufona kwevhidhiyo 1:1 uchishandisa nhamba yefoni kana zita remushandisi reChatforia.
direct.tipInvite: Zano: Namira nhamba uye fona pasina kuchengeta kontakti. Tichakoka vashandisi vasiri vashandisi ne link.

rooms.title: Imba
rooms.subtitle: Gadzira imba kana joinha imwe iripo nekunyora zita rimwe chete.
rooms.desc: Vhidhiyo yevanhu vazhinji uchishandisa zita rakagoverwa remba.
rooms.tip: Zano: goverana zita iri nevamwe, kana deep link ku /video?room=room-name.

phoneWarning.title: Nhamba yako iri kupera nokukurumidza
phoneWarning.body: Nhamba yako {{number}} ichaburitswa pa {{date}} kunze kwekunge yavhurwazve.

support.heading: Tingakubatsira sei?
support.contactIntro: Tichakutumira email mhinduro. Sanganisira ruzivo kuti utibatsire kubereka dambudziko.
support.sendError: Yatadza kutumira. Tumira email ku support@chatforia.com panzvimbo.

encryptionRecovery.title: Tonga Kuvharidzira
encryptionRecovery.description: Chengeta, dzorerazve, vhura, kana dzorerazve kiyi yako yekuvharidzira.

alert.keyRequiredBody: Bhurawuza iyi haigone kudekripta mameseji ako akavharidzwa parizvino. Dzorerazve, vhura, kana dzorerazve kiyi yako kuti uenderere mberi.

unlockPasscode.label: Unlock passcode (mudziyo wazvino)
unlockPasscode.description: Inoshandiswa kudekripta makiyi ako mumudziyo usati watumira

restoreBackupPassword.label: Password yekiyibheki
restoreBackupPassword.description: Password yakagadzirwa paunenge uchichengeta kiyi yako pa iPhone

resetLocalPasscode.label: Passcode yemuno itsva
resetLocalPasscode.description: Inodiwa usati wadzorerazve kuti kiyi itsva ichengetedzwe pamudziyo uyu

errors.restoreIncomplete: Kudzorerazve kiyi kwakakanganiswa kana kusina kufanira kune akaunti iyi
errors.noBackup: Hapana kiyibheki yakavharidzwa iripo yeakaunti iyi
errors.noServerPublicKey: Akaunti iyi haina kufumura kiyipabhuriki yesevha parizvino
errors.serverBackupMismatch: Kiyibheki yesevha haina kufanana ne kiyi yekuvharidzira yeakaunti yazvino

confirm.reset:
Dzorerazve kuvharidzira kune akaunti iyi?

Mameseji ekare akavharidzwa anogona kusazoverengwa kunze kwekunge wadzorerazve kiyi yekutanga gare gare.

encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: Izvi zvinogadzira kiyi yekuvharidzira itsva yeakaunti yako. Mameseji ekare akavharidzwa anogona kusazoverengwa kunze kwekunge wadzorerazve kiyi yekutanga gare gare.

press.title: Press
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia iapp yekutumira mameseji inotanga nekuvanzika inoita kuti kutaurirana kwemitauro kwive nyore. Mameseji anovharidzwa kubva kumagumo kusvika kumagumo nekukurumidza, uye kuturikira kwakavakwa mukati kunotsigira mitauro inodarika 100 munguva chaiyo. Vashandisi vanogona kubatsira mameseji anonyangarika, chengeta zviratidzo zvekuverengwa zvisina basa, uye sync pamadhisaini. Inowanikwa paiOS, Android, uye webhu.
press.scanTip: Uri padhesiki? Vhura nefonhi yako kuti utore app.

careers.title: Mabasa
careers.intro: Tiri timu diki yekutanga inovaka Chatforia — nhume yakavanzika, yepasi rose inotanga pawebhu, iOS, uye Android. Kana uchida kuvanzika, kuvharidzira, uye zviitiko zvinofadza zvevashandisi, tinoda kukunzwa.
careers.openRoles: Mabasa akavhurika ekutanga: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Security & Encryption Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Maitiro ekushandisa: Shandisa bhatani riri pasi kutumira resume yako nemalink.
careers.whyBullets:
• Batsira kuvaka hwaro hwenhume itsva yepasi rose.
• Tumira kuvandudzwa kunoshandiswa pawebhu, iOS, uye Android.
• Shanda zvakananga nemuvambi pane zvirongwa uye kutungamira kwechigadzirwa.
• Zvitora nzvimbo dzine simba dze stack: kutumira mameseji, izwi, vhidhiyo, kuvharidzira, telecom, AI.
• Joinha pakutanga — usati vashandisi vazhinji vawedzera.

about.title: Nezve Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia inhume yakachengeteka, ine mitauro yakawanda ine kuvharidzira kubva kumagumo kusvika kumagumo, kuturikira kwechokwadi, uye kufona kweizwi/vhidhiyo. Mishoni yedu iri nyore: batsira vanhu kubatanidza—zvakachengeteka, zvakavanzika, uye mumitauro yakasiyana.

values.privacy: Kutanga nekuvanzika: Kuvharidzira kubva kumagumo kusvika kumagumo nekukurumidza.
values.control: Kutonga: Mameseji anonyangarika & zviratidzo zvekuverengwa zvisina basa.
values.privacy_aria: Kutanga nekuvanzika: Kuvharidzira kubva kumagumo kusvika kumagumo nekukurumidza.
values.access_aria: Kuwanikwa kune vose: Auto-turikira mitauro inodarika 100.
values.control_aria: Kutonga: Mameseji anonyangarika uye zviratidzo zvekuverengwa zvisina basa.

about.howDescription: Mameseji anovharidzwa pamudziyo wako usati waenda. Kuturikira, kiyibheki, uye sync yemudziyo zvakagadzirirwa kudzikisa izvo masevha edu anogona kuona.

advertise.title: Shambadza neChatforia
advertise.description: Svika kuvashandisi vanobatanidzwa nekutumira mameseji nekuisa kwakaringana, kwakachengeteka kune mhando. Tinopa inventory yebanner munzvimbo dzinoonekwa zvakanyanya, sponsorships, uye promos dzemumba. Vanyoreri vePremium havavoni ads.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Tinoshandawo inventory kuburikidza neGoogle AdSense. Unogona kunanga Chatforia nemupublisher ID {{pubId}}, kana shandisa fomu riri pasi kune sponsorships dzakananga.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Tinoshandawo inventory shoma kuburikidza neGoogle AdSense. Sponsorships dzakananga dziripo—shandisa fomu riri pasi.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: Tiri kupedzisa inventory yedu yezvishambadziro. Tiudze nezvekampeni yako uye tichakurudzira nzvimbo.

why.highSession: Kuwanda kwakanyanya kwesevhisi uye nguva yekugara mui UI yekutaura
why.brandSafe: Mafomu akachengeteka kune mhando; kuganhurirwa kwe frequency kunoremekedzwa
why.sponsoredMoments: Nguva dzakapihwa sponsorship (e.g., “Tanga Chat” modal) dziripo
why.deals: Deals dzakananga kana programmatic kuburikidza neAdSense/Google Ads

form.submittedMsg: Ndatenda! Chikumbiro chako chiri kunzira. Tichakurumidza kukutevera.
form.missingRequired: Ndapota zadza zita, email, uye message.
form.mailtoInfo: Kuvhura email client yako kutumira chikumbiro…
